name: Barbecued Corn and Hard Shelled Crabs
recipeIngredient: 8 hard shelled crabs, cooked, washed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the olive oil with the tomato paste, minced garlic, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the hot pepper paste to the mixture.
3. Set aside.
4. Place the corn on a charcoal grill for about 15 minutes, turning every 5 minutes.
5. Remove the corn to a warm spot.
6. Brush the crabs with some of the oil mixture.
7. Grill the crabs for four minutes per side until lightly browned and the edges of the shell have slightly charred.
8. Shuck the corn and serve two crabs and an ear of corn to each diner.
9. Serve the extra spiced oil mixture as a dip for the crab and to be brushed on the corn.
10. Makes four servings.
Note: If using live hard shelled crabs, boil them first in a large pot of water seasoned with several tablespoons of crab boil (a spice blend) until all the crabs are bright red, about 10 minutes. Then proceed as instructed for cooked crabs.
